creator: umq@ueo.co.jp
text:
Hi,

Thanks for the patch.
I checkt it under FreeBSD 9.0-CURRENT/amd64 (as of 2010-10-12) with
> FreeBSD clang version 2.8 (tags/RELEASE_28 115870) 20101007
> Target: x86_64-undermydesk-freebsd9.0

USE_CSTD=3Dgnu89
seems to work okay here.

But, I don't see any difference with or without the patch against =
mpi/longlong.h.
Is it specific to a particular version of clang?

On 10/10/2010, at 5:50, Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Please note that PR ports/151349 has just been submitted.
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>    http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/151349

--=20

	Hirohisa Yamaguchi
	  <umq@ueo.co.jp>=
